text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...I've packed on some pounds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since becoming a trainer, I've had more
opportunities to eat out with the students. As a
result, I've put on weight.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hellooo!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hello! ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong, Trainer?! You seem kinda sad! Are
you feeling sick?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That would be way too tragiiiic!
choice_data_list: It's not that—I've just put on a few pounds.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oho, I see now. Well, you've been spending a lot
of time with us Umamusume, and most of us have
big appetites.
choice_data_list: Maybe I should go on a diet.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ooh! How responsible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As someone whose role it is to guide trainees, I
want to set an example by keeping myself in
good physical shape.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Your dedication is so TOUCHIIIING!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's amazing! You're incredible, Trainer! You have
a will of STEEL!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I've made up my mind! I'm going to help
you out, and I'm going at it full blast!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
FULL THROTTLE! I'll back you up to the max,
Trainer! We can do it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Ticket at full throttle?! This could be
dangerous. You'd better watch out, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
J-just help out at regular throttle, Ticket! Let's
hold back a little and put in an ordinary amount
of effort.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hmm, you think that's best? Maybe you're right...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What do you think, Trainer? Full throttle?! Or an
ordinary amount of effort?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm sooo impressed!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Leave it to me! I'll throw together a plan that
smashes all your expectations!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All right! First up, we're going to run until the sun
sets!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: H-hold on, Ticket! It's only midday!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Great work, Trainer! ...Hey, are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This run marks the start of my full-throttle
training. My body's so worn out that I can't
manage another step. Totally drained, I only
manage to flop onto my desk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I'm still alive. I guess Winning Ticket must
have dialed things back a little for my sake.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whooooa! Trainer, you were running like your life
depended on it! Just picturing it brings tears to
my eyeeees!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You really did great out there. Here, have some
water.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What you eat after a workout is another super
vital part of dieting!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We're going full throttle when it comes to food,
too, so I've handpicked a low-calorie menu for
you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, I get the sense that I'm being naive
about how easy this all seems...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Here you go! Low-cal tofu, natto, grilled fish,
chicken breast, miso soup packed with kelp, and
a large serving of fish cakes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Really? But it's a pretty ordinary amount for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it probably is ordinary for an Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I eat and eat, but don't even make a dent in the
mass of food piled before me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I just went full-throttle to fetch you another
serving, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We have to think about nutritional balance! I got
you boiled spinach, brown rice, stir-fried
mushrooms, root veggies, soy milk, yogurt, and a
large salad!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Eat up and get bigger! At full throttle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I eat so much that my body gives out, and I
collapse on the floor.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: TRAAAINEEERRR!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm reminded today that an Umamusume at full
throttle is an incredible thing to behold.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Great choice. It's best not to overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm looking forward to helping you out!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Now then... We'll start with a light
thirty-kilometer run!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Is there a problem?
choice_data_list: I thought this was going to be "ordinary"?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Of course! Thirty kilometers is ordinary. Very much so!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WHOOOAAA! I'm sooo impressed!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
For Machitan, even a thirty-kilometer run is
ordinary!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's just run like normal and shoot for
thirty!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Keep it up! You've only run ten kilometers so far!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whooooa! Trainer, you're running like your life
depends on it! Your commitment's giving me
infinite motivatiooon!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Come on, you can do it! You've got this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hmm, yeah, I don't think this is gonna cut it...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I wanna see more oomph in your running!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's it! Let's bunny hop the last twenty
kilometers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The brutal training causes my body to tap out,
leaving me collapsed on the ground.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Waaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm reminded today that what's ordinary for an
Umamusume is anything but for me.
